candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Cash flow item, not a balance sheet current assets total.
Cash flow item, not a balance sheet current assets total.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred over components.

candidates.row_label: Cash on hand and demand deposits
candidates.why: Component of cash, but not the total when a full cash and cash equivalents line exists.
Too narrow; component only.
Component of cash equivalents, not total cash and cash equivalents.
Restricted cash and long-term; not standard CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash can reconcile, but balance sheet cash line is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the direct balance sheet total rather than component cash rows.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing/component line, not total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities total.
Non-current and balancing-related; not LCT.
Non-current balancing line, not LCT.
Non-current liabilities total, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean total current debt/interest-bearing liabilities line. Under IFRS this typically captures current borrowings. Preferred over component maturities to avoid double counting.
Valid component of short-term debt/current maturities, but likely included in Current interest-bearing liabilities in some years.
Can be short-term debt, but appears blank and may be only one component.
Supplemental debt maturity disclosure; can proxy for current maturities but less preferred than reported balance sheet current interest-bearing liabilities.

variables.notes: R:c. Selected the clean total current debt line. Excluded lease-related rows per instruction and avoided combining with 'Current portion of bank loans' or 'LT Debt Mat within 1 Year' to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Direct reported current tax liabilities line.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet PPE line and best match for total/net PPE.
Only a component/alternative tangible asset category, not the main reported PPE total when PPE exists.

candidates.row_label: Capital gain on sales of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow/income-related line, not PPE stock.
Intangibles, not PPE.
Intangibles balancing line, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease/ROU gross component, not preferred for baseline PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant and equipment, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not preferred over the clean reported PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Total Tangible Assets, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not preferred.

variables.notes: Used the direct reported PPE line; preferred over lease-related or balancing rows.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Direct net operating cash flow line; preferred over before-working-capital subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final net cash flow from operating activities, not the pre-working-capital subtotal.
